member.name: T:Prime.Base.IBootstrapper
member.summary: Represents an object that can bootstrap the services and dependencies of a specific dll. When dynamically loading a dll, the tool will use reflection to find all implementations of this interface. The tool will then instantiate this class and call the Bootstrap method. Any implementations of this interface must have a public default constructor (constructor with no parameters).

member.name: M:Prime.Base.IBootstrapper.Bootstrap(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Used to bootstrap the assemblies services.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.IMefAble
member.summary: Interface for TestMethodBase to populate the services from within its the AppDomain.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.IMefAble.InitMef
member.summary: Init the Mef Manager for the specific AppDomain Will do work only once per AppDomain.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.MefManager
member.summary: This class owned the MEF management to compose all services using MEF.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. private constructor to make this class singleton.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.MefManager.Singleton
member.summary: Gets the singleton object instance of this class.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.GetAllExports``1
member.summary: Return all exports that derived from the type T.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.Init
member.summary: Initialize the MEF manager with loading all proxy dlls.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.ComposeParts(System.Object)
member.summary: Trigger compose parts which is the population of the services implementations into its interfaces.
member.param: The object toholds the interfaces needs to be populated.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.GetExport``1
member.summary: Get service implementation through the MEF.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.GetAllExportsAsDictionary
member.summary: Traverses all Services exported to MEF container and creates a (Type, object) dictionary.
member.returns: A (Type, object) dictionary. The key is the Service interface and the value is the implementaion object.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.SetupPerTos(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}@)
member.summary: Setup the specific configuration for TOS3 or TOS4.
member.param: list of dll path to load.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.LoadAssembly(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Reflection.Assembly}@)
member.summary: Load the assembly that was not yet loaded.
member.param: the list of loaded assemblies so far.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.MefManager.IsMefInitialized
member.summary: Check if MEF was initialized or not. When running in UT environment MEF is not initialized and all services are being mocked.
member.returns: The status of the MEF initialization.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.MefManagerTOS3
member.summary: This class owned the MEF management to compose all services using MEF.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.ServiceStore`1
member.summary: Service singletons provider implementation from the MEF.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.ServiceStore`1.Service
member.summary: Gets or sets a service singleton implementation from MEF.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.ServiceStore`1.GetAllServices
member.summary: Get all the services that are matches with the TService criteria (derived from it).

member.name: M:Prime.Base.ServiceStore`1.Init
member.summary: Initialize the ServiceStore add the current AppDomain.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.ServiceStore`1.GetAllExportsAsDictionary
member.summary: Traverses all Services exported to MEF container and creates a (Type, object) dictionary.
member.returns: A (Type, object) dictionary. The key is the Service interface and the value is the implementaion object.
